AccessLog.description: Access log information in the load balancer instance

BucketName.description: Name of the object storage bucket for storing Layer 7 access logs

DeliveryType.description: Log delivery type. Available values: tos (default): Deliver logs to object storage service TOS. tls: Deliver logs to log service TLS

Enabled.description: Enable access log (Layer 7) delivery to object storage TOS

Eni.description: Private IPv4 address information of the load balancer instance

EniAddress.description: Private IP address of the load balancer instance

EniID.description: Network interface ID occupied by the load balancer instance

Ipv6AddressBandwidth.description: IPv6 public bandwidth information of the load balancer instance

Bandwidth.description: Peak bandwidth of IPv6 public bandwidth, in Mbps

BandwidthPackageId.description: Shared bandwidth package ID associated with IPv6 public bandwidth

BillingType.description: Billing type for IPv6 public bandwidth

ISP.description: Line type of IPv6 public bandwidth

NetworkType.description: Network type of the load balancer instance's IPv6 address

ServerGroupId.description: ID of the backend server group in the load balancer instance

ServerGroupName.description: Name of the backend server group in the load balancer instance

AccessLog.description: Access log information in the load balancer instance

AccountId.description: Account ID to which the load balancer instance belongs

AddressIpVersion.description: IP address type of the CLB instance. Values: ipv4 (default): Indicates the CLB is IPv4 type and only supports forwarding IPv4 requests. DualStack: Indicates the CLB is dual-stack type and supports forwarding both IPv4 and IPv6 requests. DualStack can only be specified when Type is set to private

AutoRenewal.description: Whether to enable auto-renewal. true: Yes, default auto-renewal is 1 month. false (default): No

BusinessStatus.description: Whether the load balancer instance is locked

BypassSecurityGroupEnabled.description: Whether to enable bypass security group feature

CreateTime.description: Creation time of the load balancer instance

DeletedTime.description: Expected recycling time of the load balancer instance

Description.description: Description of the load balancer instance

Eip.description: Public IP information of the load balancer instance

Enabled.description: Enable status of the load balancer instance

Eni.description: Private IPv4 address information of the load balancer instance

EniAddressNum.description: Number of private IPv4 addresses for the load balancer instance. This parameter cannot be used together with EniAddress. If this parameter is provided, EniAddress is not required

EniIpv6Address.description: Private IPv6 address of the load balancer instance

Enis.description: List of private IPv4 addresses for the load balancer instance, specified by EniAddressNum during creation

ExpiredTime.description: Expiration time of the load balancer instance

Ipv6AddressBandwidth.description: IPv6 public bandwidth information for the load balancing instance

Listeners.description: Listener information in the load balancer instance

LoadBalancerBillingType.description: CLB instance billing method. Available values: 1: Annual/monthly subscription. 2 (default): Pay-as-you-go (by specification). 3: Pay-as-you-go (by usage)

LoadBalancerName.description: Name of the load balancer instance

LoadBalancerSpec.description: CLB instance specification. Different specifications provide different forwarding capabilities. small_1: Small I. small_2: Small II. medium_1: Medium I. medium_2: Medium II. large_1: Large I. large_2: Large II

LockReason.description: Reason why the load balancer instance is frozen

MasterZoneId.description: Main availability zone ID of the load balancer instance

ModificationProtectionReason.description: Reason for setting modification protection status. This parameter is valid only when ModificationProtectionStatus is set to ConsoleProtection. Must start with a letter, number, or Chinese character, and can include letters, numbers, Chinese characters, and the following special characters: half-width period (.), underscore (_), and hyphen (-). Length must be 1–80 characters

ModificationProtectionStatus.description: Whether CLB instance enables modification protection in the console. When enabled, modification or deletion via the console is prohibited. Available values: NonProtection: Disabled. ConsoleProtection: Enabled

NewArch.description: Whether it is a new architecture

OrderId.description: Order ID. This parameter is only available when LoadBalancerBillingType is set to 1 during creation

OverdueTime.description: Freeze time of the load balancer instance

Period.description: Duration for purchasing a CLB instance by year or by month. Default is '1'. When PeriodUnit is set to Month, valid values are 1–9, 12, 24, and 36. When PeriodUnit is set to Year, valid values are 1–3

PeriodUnit.description: Duration unit for purchasing subscription CLB instances. This parameter is valid only when LoadBalancerBillingType is set to 1. Values: Month (default): month. Year: year

ProjectName.description: Name of the project associated with the CLB instance

ServerGroups.description: Backend server group information in the load balancer instance

ServiceManaged.description: Whether the CLB instance is a managed resource

SlaveZoneId.description: Secondary availability zone ID of the load balancer instance

Status.description: Load balancer instance status: Inactive: stopped. Active: running. Creating: creating. Provisioning: creating. Configuring: configuring. Deleting: deleting. CreateFailed: creation failed.

SubnetId.description: Subnet ID within the VPC of the load balancer instance

Type.description: CLB instance type. Values: public: Public type. When you create a public CLB instance, the system assigns a public IP address for forwarding public requests. private: Private type. When you create a private CLB instance, the system does not assign a public IP address; you must bind a public IP manually before it can forward public requests

UpdateTime.description: Most recent operation time of the load balancer instance

VpcId.description: VPC ID of the load balancer instance

ZoneType.description: Availability zone type of the load balancer instance
